projects.name: Helios
projects.description: Next-gen flagship application processor. Aggressive re-architecture on top of the Titan platform.

projects.name: Selene
projects.description: Cost-optimized derivative SoC reusing the Luna v2.1 platform with minimal interface churn.

projects.name: Pulsar
projects.description: Flagship PCIe Gen5 / NVMe 2.0 enterprise SSD controller. Imported from the Polaris Gen4 platform; media path re-architected for BiCS8 NAND.
